integration_phase.approach: Added loadSectionsCache(), resolvePlaceholders(), and integrateSection() functions. Section integration happens AFTER HTML is generated, replacing section content from sections.json. Type B generators (PIE_CHART, WIN_TABLE, DETAILS_*) are marked with {{PLACEHOLDER}} in JSON and resolved at runtime.

sections_migrated.title: Part 1: What Is the Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model?
Part 2: Point-by-Point Review of Claimed Wins
sections_migrated.note: Includes Type B detail block placeholders

sections_migrated.title: Part 3: Live Power Dashboard & Site Page Analysis
Part 5: Analysis of AI Context Directives

key_changes: Created data/sections.json with 11 prose sections extracted from generate-html.js
Type B generators (pie chart, WIN tables, detail blocks) marked with special placeholders
Modified generate-html.js to load and integrate sections from JSON after HTML generation
Added section-loader.js helper module (not actively used but available for future)
Fixed section tab IDs to match valid tab names (pages, predictions, ai, refs)
Applied 2 prose error fixes during extraction (ISS-412, ISS-413)

recommendations_for_next_work: Analyst expansions (EXP-001, EXP-002, EXP-003) can be integrated by replacing specific section HTML content
build-doc-v4.js migration is optional - the HTML (primary output) is now properly modularized
Consider extracting prose from build-doc-v4.js into a parallel structure for Word document generation
The section loader pattern can be extended to other generators (build-doc-v4.js, PDF generation)
Monitor for future prose updates - they should now be made in sections.json with automatic resolution
